title: 01_ingest
description: Ingested content normalized to plain text. Metadata about the source.

text.description: Normalized plain-text content. The actual research material.

source_ref.description: Original path, URL, or batch id.

title.description: If extractable from the source (e.g. PDF title, URL <title>).

research_ref.description: Optional path to the 00_research dossier artifact (e.g. '00_research/v1.json'). Absent if the research stage was skipped.
